basic_details.job_title: MGU Senior Software Developer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) has published the Senior Software Developer Notification 2026 on 14-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Senior Software Developer positions. Candidates within the age range of 23 to 45 years and holding Bachelors/Masters degree in IT/CS/CA, BE/BTech in CS/IT, or Diploma in CS/CA with knowledge of PHP frameworks, front-end technologies, OOP PHP, and database management are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at MGU Official Website. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 19-05-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and othe

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 23 years Maximum Age: 45 years Relaxation: Relaxation to SC/ST/OBC Candidates as per rules. A relaxation of 1 year in age for every 1 year of service, up to a maximum of 5 years, will be given to candidates for experience in Universities.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelors/Masters degree in IT/CS/CA, BE/BTech in CS/IT, Diploma in CS/CA. Knowledge of PHP frameworks (Yii/Laravel/CodeIgniter), front-end technologies (CSS3, JS, HTML5), OOP PHP, MySQL/Maria DB/MSSQL. Docker, virtualization, containerization knowledge is an advantage.
qualification.details: Bachelors/Masters degree in Information Technology or Computer Science or Computer Applications. BE in Computer Science or IT. BTech in Computer Science or IT. Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Application. Knowledge of PHP web frameworks including Yii/Laravel/CodeIgniter. Knowledge of front-end technologies including CSS3, JavaScript, and HTML5. Understanding of object-oriented PHP programming. Familiarity with MySQL/Maria DB/MSSQL. Technology certification if any will be an added advantage. Worked with Docker, virtualization, containerization will be considered as an added advantage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the MGU Senior Software Developer post?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a walk-in interview, so there is no specific last date to apply. Candidates must attend the interview on the scheduled date, which is 19th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Software Developer position?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelors/Masters degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or Computer Applications, or a BE/BTech in Computer Science/IT, or a Diploma in Computer Science/Computer Application.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 23 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Software Developer role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Software Developer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Senior Software Developer position at Mahatma Gandhi University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for MGU Senior Software Developer recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key technical skills required?
faq.answer: Knowledge of PHP web frameworks (Yii/Laravel/CodeIgniter), front-end technologies (CSS3, JavaScript, HTML5), object-oriented PHP programming, and familiarity with MySQL/Maria DB/MSSQL are essential.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any additional advantages for certain skills?
faq.answer: Yes, a technology certification and experience with Docker, virtualization, and containerization will be considered an added advantage.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Machine Test.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Mahatma Gandhi University, Kerala. The exact venue details will be available in the official notification.
